item.title: Multiple ICE warehouses were sold by people in Trump's circle who were sitting on the properties and losing money. Some properties were bought by the feds for 10x their list price. It's a new level of corruption — and you're paying for it.
item.dc:creator: MakeUSGreatAgain

item.title: Ukraine: The balloon wars have begun.
item.description: THE BALLOON WARS Ukraine is using helium balloons to fight Russia. Aerobavovna, a Kyiv company, deploys aerostats at high altitude. Two jobs. Offensive. Balloons drift over Russian territory on stratospheric winds and drop explosive drones on targets thousands of miles inside Russia. Cheap. Hard to intercept. Forces Russia to waste expensive air defenses on a balloon. Defensive. Balloons hover at Shahed altitude with thermal cameras. When they spot an incoming Russian drone, they release an FPV interceptor to take it down before it hits a Ukrainian city. A 500 dollar balloon plus a 5000 dollar drone beating million dollar weapons systems.
item.dc:creator: vladrichdemaclant

item.title: Never loss anything again with this simple thumbnail trick, red arrows and red circles
item.dc:creator: DropDrop

item.title: Wait... Elon lied? And a Cybertruck incel believed him? – Driver intentionally drove Cybertruck into North Texas lake to use vehicle's "Wade Mode", police say
item.description:
"Police said McDaniel is charged with operation of a vehicle in a closed section of the lake, not having a valid boat registration and other water safety equipment violations." – LOL, charged with not having registered his "boat."
You can't park there mate. Also, water isn't supposed to exceed 32" and driver assumes all responsibility for damage by water.

item.title: Phone-clearing dump 429
item.description:
Oh. This snuck in, couldn’t get it out of my head since a stay in an Irish convent absolute yonks ago so looked it up. Short and sweet. Um enjoy I guess.
Reminded me a bit of:
One of the stickers on my work comp says ’be kind to me, I’m from the 1900s’.
Oh shoot. This snuck in too - one of my faves, the two-foot high kick.
From an old post, saved to torture friends. As I keep saying - we do horrible things to food.
item.dc:creator: indigenous101

item.title: I wish to know more about your religion please
item.description: This is VINDICTA! They only have 1 music video on their YouTube channel, but they seem like a good time. They are a modern metal band comprised of former members of the theatrical metal group Dogma. Vocalist Grace Jane Pasturini, guitarists Amber Maldonado and Patri Grief, along with Dogma’s co-founder and primary producer Alvaro Rabaquino, launched the band after a split from their previous management. More: https://www.instagram.com/officialvindicta
item.dc:creator: LogicDude

item.title: Her name was Oseola McCarty. People like this should always be celebrated

item.description:
1
2
3
4

9

20
21
22
23
24
25
26 Man Tax: Chris McNally
"Protesting is an act of love. It is born of a deeply held conviction that the world can be a better, kinder place. Saying "no" to injustice is the ultimate declaration of hope." -Amy Goodman So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc. Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, **Imgur Creator Spotlight is now in your hands!! Having trouble finding people I haven't already featured recently. Now I'm going to just do who YOU nominate. Tag me or DM me and I'll feature whoever you pick.**
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: Lo and behold: an opportunistic cvnt.
item.dc:creator: RealityInflicted

item.title: First kid to die on me in all my years of teaching…
item.description: #memes #socially_awkward_penguin I got the message today that a former student died today from an aggressive cancer. I had him years ago as a freshmen only for a little over a semester because of the cancer diagnosis. I remember organizing cards for all the students to sign in all of his classes and send it out. I was definitely not his favorite teacher. Kid was a football jock. Loud and sometimes annoying, but that doesn’t mean I didn’t care. I didn’t know the cancer came back when he graduated. I have been teaching for 13 years and this is the first death I’m aware of from a current or former student. Just hits hard, you know?
item.dc:creator: Hotsauceman
